---
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: styles/homepage.css
listing:
  - id: projects
    type: grid
    fields: [title, image]
    contents:
      - projects/desrapbook
      - projects/oncology
      - projects/testing
  - id: publications
    contents: publications/featured.yml
    template: publications/featured.ejs
---

::::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width=35% .profile .box}

![](images/profile.jpeg){.circular}

# [Amy Heather]{.name-font}

[POSTDOCTORAL RESEARCH ASSOCIATE AT THE UNIVERSITY OF EXETER]{.name-allcaps}

<a class="btn-social" href="https://github.com/amyheather" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-github" aria-hidden="true"></i>
  GitHub
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/amyheather/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i>
  LinkedIn
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="mailto:a.heather2@exeter.ac.uk">
  <i class="fa fa-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i>
  Email
</a>

::::

:::: {.column width=5%}

::::

:::: {.column width=60%}

[Open reproducible]{.name-font style="font-size: 3rem; color: ##f9d9d8;"}  
[health data analysis]{.name-font style="font-size: 3rem; color: #feb39a; font-style: italic;"}

Experienced in developing and maintaining reproducible analytical workflows in Python and R, with a strong emphasis on transparency, adherence to best practices, and automation.

Skilled in applying tools such as Quarto and Streamlit to create accessible, well-documented outputs, and in packaging, continuous integration and deployment, and testing to ensure robust, reliable, and shareable research code.

## Selected Projects

::: {#projects}
:::

::::

:::::

## Recent publications

::: {#publications}
:::

## Other links

<a class="btn-social" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6596-3479" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-orcid" aria-hidden="true"></i>
  ORCID
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="https://app.dimensions.ai/discover/publication?and_facet_researcher=ur.011030126111.42" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  Dimensions
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=58306926100" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  Scopus
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="https://img.shields.io/badge/Exeter_staff_profile-Amy_Heather-003c3c)](https://experts.exeter.ac.uk/39947-amy-heather" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  Exeter staff profile
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="https://osf.io/wmxtc/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  Open Science Framework (OSF)
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Amy-Heather-2/research" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  ResearchGate
</a>
<a class="btn-social" href="https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/OYD-7450-2025" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  Web of Science
</a>
